CVE-2025-3130.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Drupal Obfuscate allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Obfuscate: from 0.0.0 before 2.0.1.

CVE-2026-6871.title: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cro ...
CVE-2026-6871.description:
Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Obfuscate allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).

This issue affects Obfuscate: from 0.0.0 before 2.0.2.
